SEARCH
Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type

Interface ObjectValidator<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value that is being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ObjectPart<ObjectValidator<T>,T>, Validator<ObjectValidator<T>>
public interface ObjectValidator<T> extends Validator<ObjectValidator<T>>, ObjectPart<ObjectValidator<T>,T>
Validates the state of an Object value.

NOTE: Methods in this class throw or record exceptions under the conditions specified in their Javadoc. However, the actual exception type that is thrown or recorded may be different from what the Javadoc indicates, depending on the value of the ConfigurationUpdater.exceptionTransformer(Function) setting. This allows users to customize the exception handling behavior of the class.

  • Method Details

    • isByte

      PrimitiveByteValidator isByte()
      Ensures that the value is a Byte.
      Returns:
      a validator for the byte representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Byte

    • isShort

      PrimitiveShortValidator isShort()
      Ensures that the value is a Short.
      Returns:
      a validator for the short representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Short

    • isInteger

      PrimitiveIntegerValidator isInteger()
      Ensures that the value is an Integer.
      Returns:
      a validator for the int representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not an Integer

    • isLong

      PrimitiveLongValidator isLong()
      Ensures that the value is a Long.
      Returns:
      a validator for the long representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Long

    • isFloat

      PrimitiveFloatValidator isFloat()
      Ensures that the value is a Float.
      Returns:
      a validator for the float representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Float

      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Double

    • isBoolean

      PrimitiveBooleanValidator isBoolean()
      Ensures that the value is a Boolean.
      Returns:
      a validator for the boolean representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Boolean
      See Also:
      • Boolean.parseBoolean(String)

    • isCharacter

      PrimitiveCharacterValidator isCharacter()
      Ensures that the value is a Character.
      Returns:
      a validator for the char representation of the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is not a Character
      See Also:
      • Character.valueOf(char)
